title: Why Hinton's Biggest AI Prediction Failed!
summary: Alex Kantrowitz discusses a significant prediction made by Geoffrey Hinton that did not come to pass. The piece examines what Hinton predicted about AI development and analyzes why his forecast was incorrect.
